creator: sa.inbox@gmail.com
text:
Two attached files:
1. patch to update www/e2guardian from 3.5.1 to actual supported stable version.
2. shar file (to get the same result as after applying patch).

New port version includes some fixes and improvements:
- fixed build failure with "Include DNS authentication plugin"=ON (solution obtained from FreeBSD forums)
- pkg-message includes performance tuning recommendations

This port running without any issues on our production systems for 2 weeks already. This port should also fix https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=223486
